hub.title: Products
hub.subtitle: Explore solutions by category: facades, fenestration, security, exteriors and more.

explorer.emptyHint: Tip: try searching by material, sector or system type.

facades.title: Architectural facades
facades.description: Curtain wall, structural glazing and glass skin systems for corporate, commercial and institutional buildings.

aluminumWindows.title: Aluminum windows & systems
aluminumWindows.description: Projected, sliding and high thermal-performance systems for comfort, ventilation and energy efficiency.

doorsAccess.title: Doors & access
doorsAccess.description: Sliding, hinged, folding and hermetic doors for buildings, retail and industrial facilities.

automaticDoors.title: Automatic doors
automaticDoors.description: Standard, telescopic and armored systems for accessibility, high traffic and security.

security.title: Specialized security
security.description: Armored partitions, ballistic steel, Gesell glass, guard booths and institutional solutions.

coversExteriors.title: Roofs, pergolas & marquees
